title: Otheryia Cobblemon
description: The official Cobblemon modpack for the Otheryia Network!
body:
Welcome to Otheryia! Your ultimate Cobblemon adventure begins here! Server IP: play.otheryia.com
Discord: [https://discord.gg/otheryia](https://discord.gg/otheryia)
Store: [https://store.otheryia.com/](https://store.otheryia.com/) Always on the Latest Cobblemon Version! Why Choose Otheryia? Otheryia was built with one mission: to create a close-knit, welcoming community where players can experience the best that Cobblemon has to offer—and then some! With a passionate and responsive staff team, we’re committed to continuously enhancing your gameplay, providing top-tier support, and introducing exciting new content that keeps the experience fresh and fun. 💥 Features you’ll love: Epic PokéBoss Raids Thrilling PokéHunts Powerful PokéBuilder tools Unique Custom Quests & Starters And so much more! ⏳ Don’t wait—your best Pokémon journey is just a click away. Join today and see what makes Otheryia a truly unforgettable Cobblemon experience!
